config.description: Extension configuration (see ExtensionConfig variants: Stdio, StreamableHttp, Builtin, Platform).

AddExtensionRequest.description: Add an extension to an active session.

EmptyResponse.description: Empty success response for operations that return no data.

RemoveExtensionRequest.description: Remove an extension from an active session.

GetToolsRequest.description: List all tools available in a session.

tools.description: Array of tool info objects with `name`, `description`, `parameters`, and optional `permission`.

GooseToolCallRequest.description: Call a tool from an extension.

ReadResourceRequest.description: Read a resource from an extension.

result.description: The resource result from the extension (MCP ReadResourceResult).

UpdateWorkingDirRequest.description: Update the working directory for a session.

GetExtensionsRequest.description: List configured extensions and any warnings.

extensions.description: Array of ExtensionEntry objects with `enabled` flag, `configKey`, and flattened config details.

GetExtensionsResponse.description: List configured extensions and any warnings.

extensionConfig.description:
Extension configuration. Must be a JSON object matching one of the
`ExtensionConfig` variants (e.g. `stdio`, `streamable_http`, `builtin`).
`name` and `enabled` are injected server-side.

AddConfigExtensionRequest.description: Persist a new extension to the user's global goose config.

RemoveConfigExtensionRequest.description: Remove a persisted extension from the user's global goose config.

ToggleConfigExtensionRequest.description: Toggle the `enabled` flag for a persisted extension in the user's global goose config.

providerIds.description: Only return entries for these providers. Empty means all.

ListProvidersRequest.description: List providers with setup metadata and the current model inventory snapshot.

defaultModel.description: The default/recommended model for this provider.

configured.description: Whether Goose has enough configuration to use this provider.

category.description: Whether this inventory entry represents an agent provider or a model provider.

configKeys.description: Required configuration keys and setup metadata.

supportsRefresh.description: Whether this provider supports background inventory refresh.

refreshing.description: Whether a refresh is currently in flight.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When this entry was last successfully refreshed (ISO 8601).

lastRefreshAttemptAt.description: When a refresh was most recently attempted (ISO 8601).

lastRefreshError.description: The last refresh failure message, if any.

stale.description: Whether we believe this data may be outdated.

modelSelectionHint.description: Guidance message shown when this provider manages its own model selection externally.

id.description: Model identifier as the provider knows it.

family.description: Model family for grouping in UI.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports reasoning/extended thinking.

recommended.description: Whether this model should appear in the compact recommended picker.

ProviderInventoryModelDto.description: A single model in provider inventory.

ProviderCatalogListRequest.description: List custom-provider catalog entries. Omit `format` to list all formats.

ProviderCatalogTemplateRequest.description: Return the editable template for one catalog provider.

CustomProviderCreateRequest.description: Create a custom provider backed by Goose's declarative provider store.

skipped.description: Which providers were skipped and why.

CustomProviderReadRequest.description: Read a declarative provider config. Custom configs are editable; bundled configs are read-only.

CustomProviderUpdateRequest.description: Update a custom provider backed by Goose's declarative provider store.

CustomProviderDeleteRequest.description: Delete a custom provider from Goose's declarative provider store.

providerIds.description: Which providers to refresh. Empty means all known providers.

RefreshProviderInventoryRequest.description: Trigger a background refresh of provider inventories.

ProviderConfigReadRequest.description: Read saved configuration field values for one provider.

ProviderConfigStatusRequest.description: Return provider configured statuses. Empty provider_ids means all providers.

ProviderConfigSaveRequest.description: Save provider configuration fields and start an inventory refresh when supported.

ProviderConfigDeleteRequest.description: Delete provider configuration fields and start an inventory refresh when supported.

ProviderConfigAuthenticateRequest.description: Run a provider-owned native authentication flow and start an inventory refresh when supported.

PreferencesReadRequest.description: Read allowlisted user preferences. Empty `keys` means all supported preferences.

DefaultsReadRequest.description: Read Goose default provider and model configuration.

DefaultsSaveRequest.description: Save Goose default provider and model configuration.

sources.description: Empty means all supported import sources.

OnboardingImportScanRequest.description: Scan for existing Goose and compatible app data that onboarding can import.

OnboardingImportSourceKind.description: Sources that onboarding knows how to discover and import.

ExportSessionRequest.description: Export a session as a JSON string.

ExportSessionResponse.description: Export session response — raw JSON of the goose session with `conversation`.

ImportSessionRequest.description: Import a session from a JSON string.

ImportSessionResponse.description: Import session response — metadata about the newly created session.

UpdateSessionProjectRequest.description: Update the project association for a session.

projectDir.description: Absolute path to the project root. Required when `global` is false.

projectId.description:
Project source ID. When set with `global: false`, the backend resolves
the project's first working directory automatically. Takes precedence
over `project_dir`.

CreateSourceRequest.description: Create a new source in an explicit target scope (global or project-scoped).

path.description:
Stable on-disk path identifying this source. Pass it back to
update/delete/export to operate on this entry. Skills use the directory
containing `SKILL.md`; projects use the project file path; built-in
skills use `builtin://skills/<name>` synthetic paths.

global.description:
True when the source lives in the user's global sources directory; false
when it lives inside a specific project.

writable.description:
True when this source can be modified through source CRUD methods.
Client-provided bundled sources are returned as read-only.

supportingFiles.description:
Paths (absolute) of additional files that live alongside the source.
Only skills currently populate this; empty for other source types.

properties.description:
Arbitrary key/value pairs for type-specific metadata (e.g. icon, color,
preferredProvider for projects). Stored in the frontmatter.

includeProjectSources.description:
When true, also scan the working directories of all known projects for
project-scoped sources (e.g. skills stored under `{workingDir}/.agents/skills/`).

ListSourcesRequest.description:
List discovered sources.

If `type` is omitted or `skill`, this lists filesystem/plugin skills only.
Both global and project-scoped skills are included when `project_dir` is
set. If `type` is `builtinSkill`, this lists shipped read-only built-in
skills.

properties.description:
When `Some`, replaces all stored properties on the source. When
`None` (or omitted), the source's existing properties are
preserved. Callers that don't model the full property bag (e.g.
the skills editor, which only edits name/description/content)
should omit this so per-skill metadata isn't silently erased.

UpdateSourceRequest.description: Update an existing source's name, description, and content by absolute path.

DeleteSourceRequest.description: Delete a source and its on-disk directory by absolute path.

ExportSourceRequest.description: Export a source at an absolute path as a portable JSON payload.

ImportSourcesRequest.description:
Import a source from a JSON export payload produced by `_goose/sources/export`.
The imported source is written into the explicit target scope; on name
collisions a `-imported` suffix is appended.

DictationTranscribeRequest.description: Transcribe audio via a dictation provider.

DictationConfigRequest.description: Get the configuration status of all dictation providers.

DictationConfigResponse.description: Dictation config response — map of provider name to status.

DictationSecretSaveRequest.description: Set a dictation provider secret value.

DictationSecretDeleteRequest.description: Remove a dictation provider secret value.

DictationModelsListRequest.description: List available local Whisper models with their download status.

DictationModelDownloadRequest.description: Kick off a background download of a local Whisper model.

DictationModelDownloadProgressRequest.description: Poll the progress of an in-flight download.

progress.description: None when no download is active for this model id.

DictationModelDeleteRequest.description: Delete a downloaded local Whisper model from disk.

DictationModelSelectRequest.description: Persist the user's model selection for a given provider.
